---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem or limitation would this feature address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior and user experience.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Local-First and Security Considerations

Explain whether the proposal requires network access, cloud services, credentials, sensitive permissions, destructive actions, or new local data storage.

## Additional Context

Add examples, mockups, or related projects where useful. Do not include private or sensitive information.
